textPlain: Weirdly no issues out here in northern NY, off of the Verizon core that I believe is hosted out in central NY/Syracuse?I also haven't had any Network Extender outages indicating a more 'national' issue outside of a coast?

my iphone 16 pro works, but wife's iphone 14 pro is "sos only" mode.we tried the full reset (volume up/down/side button hold) and network reset, which is not helping.Both my and her phone have same cellular data settings.tried calling '611' verizon help line which dumps us saying "the system is down" unable to take calls.it's a big outage for sure.
That explains it. Oddly i lost connection but not my wife. Same family plan, same location.
I’m experiencing this right now, in SOS mode on Verizon (Oakland)
